ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Signed"), RecordType.Name = "IS_Agreement", NOT($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - System Administrator'), NOT($Profile.Name = 'Carmignac - Legal and Compliance'), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Users with Legal and Compliance profiles can change the status of an Agreement to signed.
